chunks.title: Moses' Exhortation to Obey the Law
chunks.reason: A continuous speech where Moses urges Israel to keep the statutes, recalls the Horeb covenant, warns against idolatry, and affirms God's uniqueness.

chunks.title: Appointment of Cities of Refuge
chunks.reason: A narrative account of Moses designating three cities for the manslayer.

chunks.title: Summary of the Law and Geography
chunks.reason: A concluding list summarizing the law given to Israel and cataloging the geographical boundaries of their territory.
